//: HTTP daemon mode: start Overwatch as a long-lived server, then point clients (primary + headless sub-agents) at its /mcp endpoint. Run the daemon with: OVERWATCH_TRANSPORT=http OVERWATCH_MCP_TOKEN=<token> node dist/index.js --http  (defaults to 127.0.0.1:3000). Stdio mode (.mcp.example.json) remains the solo/no-subagent fallback.
